build.stdout:
rm	*.o *.out \
	./kernel/*.o \
	./util/file/*.o \
	./util/timer/*.o \
	./util/opencl/*.o \
                ./util/num/*.o \
                ./output.txt

gcc	./main.c \
		-c \
		-o ./main.o \
		-O3 \
		-g
gcc	./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.c \
		-c \
		-o ./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
		-I../util -DTIMING \
		-O3
gcc	./util/file/file.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/file/file.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/num/num.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/num/num.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/timer/timer.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/timer/timer.o \
		-O3
gcc	-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
	./util/opencl/opencl.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/opencl/opencl.o \
		-O3
gcc  ../util/timing.c -I../util -I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include -c -o ./timing.o -O3
gcc	./main.o \
		./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
		./util/file/file.o \
		./util/num/num.o \
		./util/timer/timer.o \
		./util/opencl/opencl.o \
		./timing.o \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
		-lm \
		-L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/lib64 -lOpenCL \
		-I../util -DTIMING \
                        -o myocyte.out
